## 影响范围

- [ ] Web UI
- [ ] `/api/app/*`
- [ ] Memos-compatible `/api/v1/*`
- [ ] D1 / Drizzle migration
- [ ] R2 / attachments
- [ ] Cloudflare Access / deploy
- [ ] Docs

## 验证

请写明本地执行结果：

```bash
pnpm format:check
pnpm verify
pnpm deploy:dry-run
```
